gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/14)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/14)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ مِنَ الْكَبَائِرِ عُقُوقَ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَ الْيَأْسَ مِنْ رَوْحِ اللَّهِ وَ الْأَمْنَ لِمَكْرِ اللَّهِ وَ قَدْ رُوِيَ أَنَّ أَكْبَرَ الْكَبَائِرِ الشِّرْكُ بِاللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Yunus, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘From the major sins are – disloyalty to the parents, and the despair from the Spirit (Assistance) of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and the sercurity from the Plan of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’. And it has been reported that the biggest of the major sins is the association (Shirk) with Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 4. Yunus has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘Of the major sins are disregard of good relation with parents, despair for the mercy of Allah, feeling safe from the punishment of Allah and it is narrated that the biggest of the major sins is to consider things as partners of Allah.’”
